assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends Rapid channel, which is the opposite of what's expected for minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenance exclusions with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' to block upgrades while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance windows for Saturdays with specific time ranges (10:00-14:00) using FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates dedicated H100 training node pools with labels 'workload-type: training' and nodeSelector targeting training workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets 'autoUpgrade: false' on training node pools and provides blue-green upgrade strategy for manual control

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes checkpoint configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL environment variable and persistent volume mounts for checkpoint storage

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver version testing or staging validation before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking compatibility or version requirements
